---
name: Incident
about: Open an incident and post status updates as it progresses
title: "[Incident] <short summary of user impact>"
labels: incident
assignees: ''

---

<!--
Keep this issue OPEN while the incident is active. Upptime lists open issues
as active incidents and closed ones as resolved, so close it only when the
incident is fully resolved. Post each lifecycle update as a NEW COMMENT
(newest first) so subscribers get notified at every stage.
-->

**Affected components:** <e.g. Marketing site, Docs, Auth, Health API>
**Impact:** <what users actually experience, e.g. "Docs returns 404", "sign-in unavailable">
**Started:** <UTC timestamp>

---

### Status updates

**Investigating** — <UTC time> — We are investigating reports of <impact>.

<!--
Add each subsequent stage as a comment on this issue, in order:

  **Identified** — <UTC time> — We have identified the cause: <root cause>.
  **Monitoring** — <UTC time> — A fix has been applied; we are monitoring recovery.
  **Resolved**   — <UTC time> — The incident is resolved. <one-line summary + any follow-up>

Then close the issue.
-->
